article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborator with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent industry figures and his distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent industry figures such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
He has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.
His work is noted for its distinctive production choices and integration of moombahton and dancehall elements.
Noizekid is associated with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
